column1: __________ in poor health, she continued to carry out her duties.
No, this is my responsibility, __________ I appreciate your offer.
___________ his troubles he never gave up hope.
The plane came down safely __________ the mist.
_________ the bad weather, there was a large crowd at the match
We went to the party _________the bad weather outside.
She had difficulty communicating in German__________ all her years of study.
__________ he did it, it was very clever.
I really want the car, __________ much it costs.
We have to finish, __________ long it takes.
He won't go to sleep _________you tell him a story.
_________some extra money is found, the theatre will close.
